curation_notes: Patch modifies only utils/common.go (1 file, not noisy). Two functions fixed: UUID() silently returned emptyUUID when crypto/rand.Read failed to seed, and UUIDv4() fell back to calling UUID() when googleuuid.NewRandom() failed. Both now panic instead of silently producing predictable values. Pre-assigned class crypto-weakness (CWE-338) is correct — the vulnerability is a silent fallback to weak/zero randomness on crypto/rand failure. No sibling files contain the same UUID generation pattern.
